overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at dusk. The player navigates covered sidewalks, crosses intersections with light vehicle traffic, and passes towering corporate buildings with large digital billboards and cyberpunk aesthetics.

approaches intersection and waits near orange pickup truck
begins crossing the street at the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking from covered sidewalk into open intersection, navigating around stopped vehicles

notable_agents.action: orange pickup truck stopped at the intersection waiting for traffic

entered.detail: concrete overhang providing shelter at the start of the walkway
large vertical billboard displaying a face with TRUST text in neon lighting
rusted orange utility truck with large tires stopped at the intersection
skyscraper with multiple illuminated windows and advertisements

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a covered building entrance on a concrete sidewalk. The player walks toward a major intersection, passing into the open street environment. A large digital billboard displaying TRUST dominates the view ahead, while an orange pickup truck waits at the intersection. The player approaches and begins crossing the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with vehicle traffic and construction barriers

events.description: camera tilts sharply upward toward the sky, likely from a jump or collision
camera returns to normal walking level and continues forward

agents.ego_description: recovering from a sudden camera tilt and continuing past the orange truck along the curb

notable_agents.action: orange pickup truck now parked along the right side of the street

entered.detail: orange and gray metal barriers blocking off a section of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: While crossing the street, the camera suddenly tilts upward toward the sky at 16 seconds before recovering. The player walks past the orange pickup truck now parked on the side, and passes orange construction barriers lining the sidewalk. The environment transitions from the open intersection to a narrower path alongside the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk alongside corporate building wall

events.description: continues walking steadily following a pedestrian ahead in yellow jacket

agents.ego_description: walking along a covered sidewalk following a pedestrian in a bright yellow jacket

entered.detail: smooth dark concrete wall of a skyscraper extending along the left side

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a narrow sidewalk enclosed by a tall corporate building wall on the left and open sky on the right. The pavement features yellow tactile strips. A pedestrian in a yellow jacket walks ahead in the same direction, maintaining a steady pace as they move toward a distant intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with political billboard and futuristic architecture

events.description: exits narrow sidewalk into open plaza area with large billboard
turns right at the modern building entrance with diamond logo

agents.ego_description: crossing an open plaza area with a large VOTE billboard, then turning right at a modern building

entered.detail: large horizontal billboard displaying VOTE text with political messaging and imagery
futuristic building with large illuminated white diamond-shaped logo on facade
angular metallic entrance canopy with bright white accent lighting

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the narrow sidewalk into a wide open plaza featuring a prominent VOTE billboard. A striking modern building with a large illuminated diamond logo stands on the left. The player crosses the open area and turns right at the building's geometric entrance, continuing along a new sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk in corporate district leading toward city center

events.description: continues walking straight toward distant illuminated corporate towers

agents.ego_description: walking along a covered sidewalk toward the city center with tall buildings visible in the distance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the distance toward the city center

entered.detail: cluster of illuminated skyscrapers visible at the end of the street with neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the player walking along a covered sidewalk with a building wall on the left. The path leads toward a distant cluster of illuminated corporate towers glowing against the dusk sky. Other pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction as the player moves steadily toward the city center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sheltered building entrance into the open, neon-lit expanse of a corporate city district. It begins on a concrete sidewalk under a covered entrance, moving forward toward a major intersection dominated by a massive digital billboard displaying TRUST and an orange pickup truck. As the camera crosses the street, it briefly tilts upward toward the sky before recovering to pass the parked truck and a series of orange construction barriers. The scene then shifts from the wide intersection to a narrower path, where the camera follows a pedestrian in a yellow jacket along a sidewalk marked with yellow tactile strips. This path is enclosed by a towering corporate wall on the left, guiding the movement steadily toward a distant intersection under the open sky.

The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a narrow urban corridor into a wide corporate plaza and finally toward a dense cluster of glowing skyscrapers. It begins as the camera emerges from a tight sidewalk into an expansive open area dominated by a prominent VOTE billboard and a modern building featuring a large illuminated diamond logo. As the player crosses this plaza, the camera turns right at the building's geometric entrance to transition onto a new pedestrian path. The scene then shifts to a covered sidewalk flanked by a high building wall, where the perspective aligns with other pedestrians moving forward. Finally, the path opens up to reveal a distant skyline of illuminated corporate towers glowing against the deepening dusk sky.
